prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction of VRTX stock, I applied a random walk model with historical volatility estimates typical for biotech stocks (~25-30% annualized). The point estimate assumes no drift, while confidence intervals reflect approximately 2.4% daily volatility scaled to 2 days. Intervals widen progressively: 50% CI spans ±2.4%, 80% CI spans ±4.1%, and 90% CI spans ±5.2% from the current price to capture increasing uncertainty levels.
